content.full_text:
July 27, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division
Attn: Terri
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

RE: Statements of Economic Interests, Form 721 and Interpretation of Assuming and Leaving Office Dates

This letter is to confirm my understanding that Commissioner Diana Doo does not need to complete an assuming Statement of Economic Interests, form 721 as she has completed an annual Statement of Economic Interests, form 721 already for the year as an Alternate Commissioner for the Coastal Commission and there are no changes to report.

Commissioner Doo replaced Commissioner Mark Nathanson on May 12, 1992 when she was sworn in as a Commissioner. I am uncertain of the leaving office date of Commissioner Nathanson as he did not attend another meeting after March 13th and his leaving Statement of Economic Interests, form 721 did not identify a specific date. Could you, please provide me with Commissioner Nathanson's leaving office date that the Fair Political Practices Commission used so that I may process his separation documents?

Please contact me at (415) 904-5432 or ATSS 539-5432 if you have any questions with my understanding or request.

Denise Choye
Personnel Analyst

Enclosure
